# 验证码识别

- 通用验证码: [ddddocr-node](https://github.com/renhaoyeh/ddddocr-node)
- 滑块验证码: [ddddocr](https://github.com/sml2h3/ddddocr/blob/master/ddddocr/core/slide_engine.py)
- 旋转验证码: [JJBJJ](https://github.com/JJBJJ)提供

## 环境变量

- 服务器端口: `PORT=7788 (整数)`
- 接口认证: `AUTH= (字符串)`
  - 空字符串时不校验, 非空请求携带头`Authorization: Bearer xxx`
- OCR模型(BETA模型): `OCR_MODE=0 (整数)`

  | 值  | 含义                     |
  | --- | ------------------------ |
  | 0   | 适用于多数简单验证码场景 |
  | 1   | 部分复杂验证码效果更好   |

- OCR范围: `OCR_RANGE=6 (整数)`

  | 值  | 含义                                                   |
  | --- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
  | 0   | 数字0-9                                                |
  | 1   | 小写a-z                                                |
  | 2   | 大写A-Z                                                |
  | 3   | 小写a-z + 大写A-Z                                      |
  | 4   | 小写a-z + 数字0-9                                      |
  | 5   | 大写A-Z + 数字0-9                                      |
  | 6   | 小写a-z + 大写A-Z + 数字0-9                            |
  | 7   | 自定义字符(配合OCR_CHARSET使用), 默认: 0123456789+-x/= |

- OCR字符集(OCR范围为7时生效): `OCR_CHARSET=0123456789+-x/ (字符串)`

## 启动

```bash
# mac
PORT=9999 ./ocr-bin-macos-arm64 # arm64 指定端口
OCR_RANGE=7 OCR_CHARSET=G2UB ./ocr-bin-macos-x64 # x86_64 指定模型(自定义字符集)

# linux
OCR_MODE=1 OCR_RANGE=0 ./ocr-bin-linux-arm64 # arm64 指定模型
./ocr-bin-linux-x64 # x86_64

# windows
set OCR_MODE=1 && set OCR_RANGE=0 && ocr-bin-win-arm64.exe # arm64 指定模型
set PORT=9000 && ocr-bin-win-x64.exe # x86_64 指定端口
```

## 使用说明

> 第一次运行较慢(需释放资源)

🌐 地址 [http://127.0.0.1:7788](http://127.0.0.1:7788)

📝 接口文档简述

| 接口      | 方法 | 说明                                                                   |
| :-------- | :--- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `/ocr`    | POST | 通用验证码识别 (data, mode, range, charset)                            |
| `/rotate` | POST | 旋转验证码识别 (thumb, bg)                                             |
| `/slide`  | POST | 滑动验证码识别 (thumb, bg, type:match(边缘算法)/comparison(差异算法) ) |
| `/health` | GET  | 健康检查                                                               |

💡 调用说明

- JSON: Content-Type: application/json (传 Base64 或 URL)
- Form: Content-Type: multipart/form-data (传 图片文件)

## 示例

### 通用

```bash
# linux/mac

# 请求方式一
curl 'http://127.0.0.1:7788/ocr' \
-X POST \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
-d '{"data":"data:image/jpeg;base64,"}'

# {"status":0,"data":{"code":"G2uB"},"msg":"success"} # 响应

curl 'http://127.0.0.1:7788/ocr' \
-X POST \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
-d '{"data":"https://images2018.cnblogs.com/blog/1047463/201804/1047463-20180406163706898-1017943434.png"}'

# {"status":0,"data":{"code":"0413"},"msg":"success"} # 响应


# 请求方式二
curl 'http://127.0.0.1:7788/ocr' \
-X POST \
-H 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' \
-F data=@/Users/xxx/Downloads/yzm.jpeg  # 文件路径

# {"status":0,"data":{"code":"4pxn"},"msg":"success"} # 响应
```

```bash
# window cmd(非powershell)

# 请求方式一
curl "http://127.0.0.1:7788/ocr" ^
-X POST ^
-H "Content-Type: application/json" ^
-d "{\"data\":\"\"}"

# {"status":0,"data":{"code":"3445"},"msg":"success"} # 响应

curl "http://127.0.0.1:7788/ocr" ^
-X POST ^
-H "Content-Type: application/json" ^
-d "{\"data\":\"https://images2018.cnblogs.com/blog/1047463/201804/1047463-20180406163706898-1017943434.png\"}"

# {"status":0,"data":{"code":"0413"},"msg":"success"} # 响应


# 请求方式二
curl "http://127.0.0.1:7788/ocr" ^
-X POST ^
-H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" ^
-F "data=@C:\Users\xxx\Downloads\yzm.jpeg"  # 文件路径

# {"status":0,"data":{"code":"4pxn"},"msg":"success"} # 响应
```

### 旋转

```bash
# linux/mac
# 其他请求方法同通用验证码示例

curl 'http://127.0.0.1:7788/rotate' \
-X POST \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
-d '{"bg":"data:image/png;base64,","thumb":"data:image/png;base64,"}'

# {"status":0,"data":{"cw":276,"ccw":84},"msg":"success"} # 响应
```

### 滑动

```bash
# linux/mac
# 其他请求方法同通用验证码示例

curl 'http://127.0.0.1:7788/slide' \
-X POST \
-H 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' \
-F 'bg=@"/Users/xxx/Downloads/slide_bg2.jpeg";filename="slide_bg2.jpeg";headers="Content-Type: image/jpeg"' \
-F 'thumb=@"/Users/xxx/Downloads/slide_target2.jpeg";filename="slide_target2.jpeg";headers="Content-Type: image/jpeg"' \
-F 'type=comparison'

# {"status":0,"data":{"x":142,"y":66},"msg":"success"} # 响应
```

## 📝 许可

本项目沿用原项目 [ddddocr](https://github.com/sml2h3/ddddocr) 的许可证 [MIT License](./LICENSE)
